pages.text:
Ambassade de France aux Etats-Unis

Nº 2017-3127696

L'Ambassade de France présente ses compliments au Département d'Etat et a

l'honneur d'accuser réception en date du 10 mai 2017 de l'instrument de ratification du

Gouvernement des Etats-Unis d'Amérique, signé le 9 mai 2017, relatif à leur accession à la Convention relative aux expositions universelles (Paris, 22 novembre 1928).

L'Ambassade de France saisit cette occasion pour renouveler au Département

d'Etat les assurances de sa très haule considération. NIS

DE

FRANCE

ET

Washington,

REPYARQUE FRANÇAISE

*

SINS

Département d'Etat

S.E. Monsieur Rex TILLERSON

Secretaire d'Etat

S/c French Desk

Room 5218 2201 C Street NW

Washington DC 20520

Ambassade de France aux Etats-Unis

N°

NON-OFFICIAL COURTESY TRANSLATION

The Embassy of France presents its compliments to the Department of State

and has the honor to acknowledge receipt on May 10, 2017, of the instrument of ratification of the government of the United States of America, signed on May 9, relating to its accession to the Convention relating to International Exhibitions (Paris, November 22, 1928).

State the assurance asy of ken conakes is ng ortunity to renew to the Department of

State the assurances of its highest consideration./.

Washington, May 10, 2017

The Department of State:

The Honorable Rex TILLERSON

United States Secretary of State c/o French Desk

Room 5218 2201 C Street NW

Washington DC 20520

Tel: 202-647-0240
